2603.26863.title: EZASP -- Facilitating the usage of ASP
2603.26863.paper_summary: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a declarative programming language used for modeling and solving complex combinatorial problems. It has been successfully applied to a number of different realworld problems. However, learning its usage can prove challenging as the declarative language, from a conceptual perspective, differs substantially from imperative programming, and programs are not required to adhere to any particular structure, offering arguably almost too much freedom for a beginner. Recently, a new methodology called Easy Answer Set Programming (Easy ASP) has been introduced that aims to aid in this learning process by focussing on a well-defined fragment of the ASP language and introducing additional structure to the programs. However, while this methodology can indeed be employed, to the best of our knowledge, no tool integrates its features currently. In this paper, we present EZASP, a Visual Studio Code extension designed to support the development of ASP programs following the Easy ASP methodology. It covers and extends the language fragment of Easy ASP and provides the user with warnings in the case of deviations from the methodology as well as the possibility to automatically reorder the program. Complementarily, it also adds syntax error highlighting, including detection of non-safe variables directly while editing, and configurability, as all features can be optionally disabled. A small user study in the context of university teaching suggests that these features are benefitial for both new and experienced users.
2603.26863.paper_summary_zh: 答案集程式設計（ASP）是一種用於建模和解決複雜組合問題的聲明式程式語言。<lb/>它已成功應用於許多不同的實際問題。<lb/>然而，學習其用法可能會很具挑戰性，因為從概念的角度來看，聲明式語言與命令式程式設計有著實質性的不同，並且程式不需要遵循任何特定的結構，這對於初學者來說幾乎提供了過多的自由。<lb/>最近，推出了一種名為簡易答案集程式設計（Easy ASP）的新方法，旨在通過專注於ASP語言的一個明確片段並為程式引入額外的結構來幫助這一學習過程。<lb/>然而，儘管這種方法確實可以被使用，但據我們所知，目前尚無工具整合其特性。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了EZASP，一個旨在支持遵循簡易ASP方法開發ASP程式的Visual Studio Code擴展。<lb/>它涵蓋並擴展了簡易ASP的語言片段，並在偏離該方法時為用戶提供警告，以及自動重新排序程式的可能性。<lb/>此外，它還增加了語法錯誤高亮顯示，包括在編輯時直接檢測不安全變數的功能，以及可配置性，因為所有功能都可以選擇性地禁用。<lb/>在大學教學背景下進行的小型用戶研究表明，這些特性對於新用戶和經驗豐富的用戶都是有益的。
2603.26863.author: Rafael Martins et.al.
2603.26863.authors: Rafael Martins, Matthias Knorr, Ricardo Gonçalves
